user.title: Add PlantSense Device
user.description: Please enter the serial (MAC) of the device int the form xxxxxxxxxxxx

integration_discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the PlantSense device {devicename} (Serial: {serial})?

init.title: Configure PlantSense Device
init.description: Changes to device settings are pushed automatically on the next received message. Use the 'Cancel Config Push' button entity to abort a pending update.

data.enable_test: Use data from devices in test mode
data.moi_dry: Moisture dry point (raw ADC value when soil is dry)
data.moi_wet: Moisture wet point (raw ADC value when soil is wet)
data.name: Change the name of the device
data.update_test_mode: Enable test mode on the device
